name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES state

(* State of each process: idle, trying, critical *)
Init == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

Next == \/ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ state[i] = "idle"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "trying"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ state[i] = "trying"
          /\ \A j \in 1..N: j # i => state[j] # "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "critical"]
        \/ \E i \in 1..N:
          /\ state[i] = "critical"
          /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "idle"]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state>>

TypeOK == state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES participants, state, votes, decision

(* State of each participant: "Init", "Prepared", "Committed", "Aborted" *)
Init == participants = [i \in 1..N |-> "Init"] /\ state = participants /\ votes = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE] /\ decision = "None"

Prepare(i) == state[i] = "Init" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Prepared"] /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

VoteYes(i) == state[i] = "Prepared" /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE] /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

VoteNo(i) == state[i] = "Prepared" /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE] /\ UNCHANGED <<state, decision>>

Commit(i) == state[i] = "Prepared" /\ decision = "Commit" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Committed"] /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

Abort(i) == state[i] = "Prepared" /\ decision = "Abort" /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Aborted"] /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision>>

CoordinatorDecision == decision = "None" /\ (\A i \in 1..N : votes[i]) /\ decision' = "Commit" \/ (\E i \in 1..N : votes[i] = FALSE) /\ decision' = "Abort" /\ UNCHANGED <<state, votes>>

Next == \E i \in 1..N : Prepare(i) \/ VoteYes(i) \/ VoteNo(i) \/ Commit(i) \/ Abort(i) \/ CoordinatorDecision

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, state, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, state

(* forks[i] = 0 if fork i is free, 1 if held by philosopher i *)
(* state[i] ∈ {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

Init == forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Left(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
Right(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

PickUp(i) ==
  forks[Left(i)] = 0 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0 /\
  forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1] /\
  state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

PutDown(i) ==
  forks[Left(i)] = 1 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 1 /\
  forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0] /\
  state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

Hungry(i) ==
  state[i] = "thinking" /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0 /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0

Next ==
  \E i \in 1..N :
    (state[i] = "hungry" /\ PickUp(i)) \/ (state[i] = "eating" /\ PutDown(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, state>>

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


CONSTANT N
ASSUME N \in Nat

VARIABLES num, flag

Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
          /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(Seq(num))]
          /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* Type invariant: q is a sequence of length K, head and tail are indices in 0..K-1, size in 0..K *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ q \in Seq(0..K)
    /\ head \in 0..K-1
    /\ tail \in 0..K-1
    /\ size \in 0..K

(* Initial state: empty queue *)
Init == 
    /\ q = <<>>
    /\ head = 0
    /\ tail = 0
    /\ size = 0

(* Producer action: blocks if queue is full *)
Producer == 
    /\ size < K
    /\ q' = Append(q, 1)  \* Enqueue a dummy item
    /\ tail' = (tail + 1) ~% K
    /\ size' = size + 1
    /\ UNCHANGED head

(* Consumer action: blocks if queue is empty *)
Consumer == 
    /\ size > 0
    /\ q' = Tail(q)  \* Dequeue an item
    /\ head' = (head + 1) ~% K
    /\ size' = size - 1
    /\ UNCHANGED tail

Next == Producer \/ Consumer

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, NULL
ASSUME N \in Nat /\ N > 0

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = [i \in 1..N |-> NULL]
        /\ state = [i \in 1..N |-> "Follower"]

Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Follower"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
             /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![i] = i]
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Candidate"]
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Candidate"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = votedFor
             /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![i] = "Leader"]
          \/ /\ state[i] = "Leader"
             /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
             /\ votedFor' = votedFor
             /\ state' = state

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = 0
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers + 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers - 1
          /\ writer_active' = writer_active
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = readers
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamport ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Proc, Chan

VARIABLES state, channel, marker

(* state[p] is the local state of process p *)
(* channel[c] is the sequence of messages in channel c *)
(* marker[c] is TRUE if a marker has been received on channel c *)

Init == /\ state = [p \in Proc |-> 0]
        /\ channel = [c \in Chan |-> <<>>]
        /\ marker = [c \in Chan |-> FALSE]

Send(p, q, m) == 
  channel' = [channel EXCEPT !p..q = Append(channelp..q, m)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

Receive(p, q) ==
  /\ channelp..q # <<>>
  /\ channel' = [channel EXCEPT !p..q = Tail(channelp..q)]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<state, marker>>

RecordState(p) ==
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = state[p] + 1]
  /\ marker' = [marker EXCEPT !p..q = TRUE | q \in Proc]
  /\ UNCHANGED channel

Next == \/ \E p, q \in Proc : Send(p, q, 1)
        \/ \E p, q \in Proc : Receive(p, q)
        \/ \E p \in Proc : RecordState(p)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, channel, marker>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES token

Init == token = 1

Next == token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values :
          store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PaxosSingleDecree ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, M, V

VARIABLES ballots, promises, accepts, chosen

(* ballots: [1..M -> Nat] -- current ballot number for each proposer
   promises: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] -- highest promised ballot and value seen by each acceptor
   accepts: [1..N -> [ballot: Nat, value: V]] -- highest accepted ballot and value by each acceptor
   chosen: [1..V -> BOOLEAN] -- whether a value has been chosen *)

Init == ballots = [i \in 1..M |-> 0] /\ promises = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]] /\ accepts = [i \in 1..N |-> [ballot |-> 0, value |-> <<>>]] /\ chosen = [v \in V |-> FALSE]

Prepare(p) == /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = ballots[p] + 1]
              /\ UNCHANGED promises /\ accepts /\ chosen

Promise(a) == /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[p], value |-> IF ballots[p] >= promises[a].ballot THEN accepts[a].value ELSE <<>>]]
              /\ UNCHANGED ballots /\ accepts /\ chosen

Accept(p, v) == /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot |-> ballots[p], value |-> v]]
               /\ UNCHANGED ballots /\ promises /\ chosen

Chosen(v) == /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![v] = TRUE]
            /\ UNCHANGED ballots /\ promises /\ accepts

Next == \E p \in 1..M : Prepare(p) \/ \E a \in 1..N : Promise(a) \/ \E v \in V : Accept(p, v) \/ \E v \in V : Chosen(v)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballots, promises, accepts, chosen>>

====

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS File, MAX_RETRIES

VARIABLES sent, acked, retransmits

Init == sent = <<>> /\ acked = <<>> /\ retransmits = <<>> 

Next == 
  /\ sent' = Append(sent, SubSeq(File, Len(sent)+1, Len(File)))
  /\ acked' = acked
  /\ retransmits' = retransmits

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<sent, acked, retransmits>>

name: Transaction Isolation (Snapshot Isolation)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SnapshotIsolation ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Txns, Keys, Values

VARIABLES data, active, committed, aborted, readSet, writeSet, snapshot, t

Init ==
    /\ data = [k \in Keys |-> 0]
    /\ active = {}
    /\ committed = {}
    /\ aborted = {}
    /\ readSet = [t \in Txns |-> <<>>]
    /\ writeSet = [t \in Txns |-> <<>>]
    /\ snapshot = [t \in Txns |-> [k \in Keys |-> 0]]

    /\ t \notin active
    /\ t \notin committed
    /\ t \notin aborted
    /\ active' = active \cup {t}
    /\ committed' = committed
    /\ aborted' = aborted
    /\ readSet' = [readSet EXCEPT ![t] = <<>>]
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![t] = <<>>]
    /\ snapshot' = [snapshot EXCEPT ![t] = data]
    /\ data' = data

Read(t, k) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ readSet' = [readSet EXCEPT ![t] = Append(~readSet[t], k)]
    /\ writeSet' = writeSet
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ data' = data

Write(t, k, v) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![t] = Append(~writeSet[t], <<k, v>>)]
    /\ readSet' = readSet
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ data' = data

Commit(t) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ \A k \in Keys :
        \A t' \in active \ {t} :
            (\E kv \in writeSet[t'] : kv[1] = k) => aborted' = aborted \cup {t}
    /\ committed' = committed \cup {t}
    /\ active' = active \ {t}
    /\ readSet' = readSet
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![t] = <<>>]
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ data' = [k \in Keys |-> IF k \in ~writeSet[t] THEN data[k] ELSE ~writeSet[t][k..1]]

Abort(t) ==
    /\ t \in active
    /\ aborted' = aborted \cup {t}
    /\ active' = active \ {t}
    /\ readSet' = readSet
    /\ writeSet' = [writeSet EXCEPT ![t] = <<>>]
    /\ snapshot' = snapshot
    /\ data' = data

Next ==
    \E t \in Txns :


Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<data, active, committed, aborted, readSet, writeSet, snapshot>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ data \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ active \in SUBSET Txns
    /\ committed \in SUBSET Txns
    /\ aborted \in SUBSET Txns
    /\ readSet \in [Txns -> Seq(Keys)]
    /\ writeSet \in [Txns -> Seq(<<Keys)]
    /\ snapshot \in [Txns -> [Keys -> Values]]

name: Clock Synchronisation
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ClockSync ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, epsilon

VARIABLES clocks, offsets

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == clocks \in 1..N -> Real /\ offsets \in 1..N -> Integers

(* Initial state: clocks start at 0, offsets are 0 *)
Init == clocks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0] /\ offsets = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]

(* One round of synchronization: each node updates its clock to the average of all clocks plus its offset *)
Next == /\ clocks' = [i \in 1..N |-> (SUM(j \in 1..N |-> clocks[j] + offsets[j]) \div N)]
          /\ offsets' = offsets

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<clocks, offsets>>

name: Peterson's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Peterson ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS P1, P2

VARIABLES flag, turn

Init == /\ flag = [P1 |-> FALSE, P2 |-> FALSE]
        /\ turn = P1

Next == \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = TRUE]
          /\ turn = P2
        \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = TRUE]
          /\ turn = P1
        \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P1] = FALSE]
        \/ /\ flag = [flag EXCEPT ![P2] = FALSE]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<flag, turn>>

name: Gossip Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GossipProtocol ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE known, infected

vars == <<known, infected>>

Init == /\ known = [i \in 1..N |-> <<>>]
        /\ infected = [i \in 1..N |-> {}]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : \E j \in 1..N :
          /\ known' = [known EXCEPT ![i] = Append(known[i], j)]
          /\ infected' = [infected EXCEPT ![i] = infected[i] \cup {j}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_vars

name: Simple Allocator
generated_spec:
---- MODULE PageAllocator ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N, Clients

Pages == 1..N

VARIABLE free, allocated

Init == /\ free = Pages
        /\ allocated = [c \in Clients |-> {}]

Next == \E c \in Clients :
          \E p \in free :
            /\ allocated' = [allocated EXCEPT ![c] = @ \cup {p}]
            /\ free' = free \ {p}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<free, allocated>>

name: Publish-Subscribe Broker
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Broker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

CONSTANTS Subscribers, Topics, Messages

VARIABLES subs, msgs

(* subs: [topic -> SUBSCRIBERS] maps each topic to the set of subscribers interested in it *)
(* msgs: [topic -> SEQUENCE[message] ] maps each topic to the sequence of messages posted on it *)

Init ==
    /\ subs = [t \in Topics |-> {}]
    /\ msgs = [t \in Topics |-> <<>>]

Register(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ subs'[topic] = subs[topic] \cup {sub}
    /\ msgs' = msgs

Post(sub, topic, msg) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ msgs' = [msgs EXCEPT ![topic] = Append(msgs[topic], msg)]
    /\ subs' = subs

Deliver(sub, topic) ==
    /\ sub \in Subscribers
    /\ topic \in Topics
    /\ sub \in subs[topic]
    /\ msgs' = msgs
    /\ subs' = subs

Next ==
    \E sub \in Subscribers : \E topic \in Topics : \E msg \in Messages :
        Register(sub, topic) \/ Post(sub, topic, msg) \/ Deliver(sub, topic)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<subs, msgs>>

====

name: Dekker's Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Dekker ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences

VARIABLES turn, wants

Init == /\ turn = 0
        /\ wants = <<FALSE, FALSE>>

Next == \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants
       \/ /\ wants[1] = FALSE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = 1
          /\ wants' = <<FALSE, TRUE>>
       \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = FALSE
          /\ turn' = 0
          /\ wants' = <<TRUE, FALSE>>
       \/ /\ wants[1] = TRUE
          /\ wants[2] = TRUE
          /\ turn' = turn
          /\ wants' = wants

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<turn, wants>>

TypeOK == /\ turn \in {0, 1}
          /\ wants \in {<<FALSE, FALSE>>, <<FALSE, TRUE>>, <<TRUE, FALSE>>, <<TRUE, TRUE>>}

====

name: Eventually Consistent Counter
generated_spec:
---- MODULE GCounter ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, Node

VARIABLES counts

Init == /\ counts \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]
        /\ \A n \in Node: counts[n] = [m \in Node |-> 0]

Next == \E n \in Node:
          /\ counts' = [counts EXCEPT ![n] = [m \in Node |-> counts[n][m] + 1]]
          /\ counts' \in [Node -> [Node -> Nat]]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_counts
